faqs.question: What ant species are most common in Old Westbury estates?
faqs.answer: Old Westbury properties typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning for historic homes and properties with mature trees, as they can damage wood structures. Our inspection identifies the exact species and entry points specific to your estate.
